name: massrobotics_amr_sender
description: MassRobotics AMR Interop Sender
readme: massrobotics_amr_sender Configuration-based ROS2 package sending MassRobotics AMR Interop Standard messages compliant receivers. Package installation binary packages node released package added manually ROS2 build installation running command: sudo apt-get install ros-foxy-massrobotics-amr-sender Alternatively, add package rosdep dependency install running rosdep update Building source ros2 installed properly. clone repository src folder local workspace build package executing commands: Create ROS2 workspace mkdir ~/ros2_ws/src ros2_ws/ Clone repo workspace git clone https://github.com/inorbit-ai/ros_amr_interop.git ./src Install dependencies rosdep update rosdep install --ignore-src --from-paths src/ Run build colcon build --packages-select massrobotics_amr_sender Node configuration configuration file define ROS2 messages mapped AMR Interop Standard messages. sample_config.yaml reference. Running sender node node takes MassRobotics AMR config file path parameter. assumed file current directory. Remember source ROS2 environment binary installation workspace overlay source install/setup.bash Launch node pointing configuration file ros2 launch massrobotics_amr_sender massrobotics_amr_sender.launch.py config_file:=/path/to/config.yaml Running tests local workspace: colcon test --packages-select massrobotics_amr_sender colcon test-result --verbose

name: vda5050_connector
description: ROS2 to VDA5050 / VDA5050 to ROS2 connector
authors: John Alejandro Duarte Carrasco, Leandro Pineda
readme: VDA5050 Connector ROS2 package implements connector VDA5050, standardized interface communication fleets AGVs/AMRs central Master Control. Overview package names Connector, thought bridge VDA5050 Master Control ROS2 robot API. connector composed main parts (ROS2 nodes): MQTT_bridge: Communicates VDA5050 ROS2 topics, translating VDA5050 messages ROS2 vda5050_msgs vice versa. Controller: Processes VDA5050 robot execution standard specification. validates, executes, rejects orders instant actions, assembles feedback information Adapter: interaction controller Robot API. adapter send navigation goal request, execute action retrieve specific information robot battery odometry. adapter execute operations requested controller ROS2 plugins (components). current project plugin template interfaces, called handlers, cover main communication paths: State handler: Designed updating robot specific information VDA5050 order_state. NavTONode handler: Designed sending goals robot navigation stack. VDA Action handler: Designed handling requests execute specific actions (localize, lift load, package library package; exports headers binary files create assemble specific adapter. create adapter package, add package dependency define plugin handlers robot. customize adapter core functionalities desired. check vda5050_examples repository, find examples adapter packages, python docker scripts quickly start testing Dependencies ROS2 ament_cmake: package based ROS2, ament_cmake. vda5050_msgs: ROS2 messages VDA5050 standard (version pluginlib: adapter plugins load handlers. python3-paho-mqtt: mqtt_bridge paho-mqtt library mqtt client. Compilation Download vda5050_msgs package ROS2 workspace ~/dev_ws/ git clone --branch ros2-vda5050-v2 https://github.com/ipa320/vda5050_msgs.git vda5050_msgs/vda5050_msgs ./src/vda5050_msgs vda5050_msgs/vda5050_serializer ./src/vda5050_serializer vda5050_msgs download package ROS2 workspace src folder compile colcon build. Testing package lint test (ament_pep257 ament_flake8 Python, ament_clang_format ament_copyright), specific unit tests check correct functionality modules. run tests, execute: colcon test --packages-select vda5050_connector colcon test-result --verbose Contributing CONTRIBUTING document. License

name: vda5050_msgs
description:
The vda5050_msgs package contains the datatypes (json objects) specified by the VDA
    "Arbeitskreis Schlüsseltechnologien" in their recommondation "VDA 5050 - Schnittstelle zur Kommunikation zwischen
    Fahrerlosen Transportfahrzeugen (FTF) und einer Leitsteuerung.
    This package provides the message files which can be used to be (de-)serialized with an implementation of mqtt
    (e.g mqtt_bridge) or to plain json (rospy_message_converter) or similar.

name: vda5050_serializer
description:
The serialization/deserialization functions to be loaded into the mqtt_bridge. During (de-)serialization
    the case of the keys is corrected from snake_case on ROS side to dromedaryCase on MQTT/JSON side

name: ros_ign_bridge
description: Bridge communication between ROS and Ignition Transport
readme: Bridge communication ROS Ignition Transport package network bridge enables exchange messages ROS Ignition Transport. bridge implemented point support service calls. support limited message types: ROS type Ignition Transport type std_msgs/msg/Bool ignition::msgs::Boolean std_msgs/msg/ColorRGBA ignition::msgs::Color std_msgs/msg/Empty ignition::msgs::Empty std_msgs/msg/Float32 ignition::msgs::Float std_msgs/msg/Float64 ignition::msgs::Double std_msgs/msg/Header ignition::msgs::Header std_msgs/msg/Int32 ignition::msgs::Int32 std_msgs/msg/UInt32 ignition::msgs::UInt32 std_msgs/msg/String ignition::msgs::StringMsg geometry_msgs/msg/Wrench ignition::msgs::Wrench geometry_msgs/msg/Quaternion ignition::msgs::Quaternion geometry_msgs/msg/Vector3 ignition::msgs::Vector3d geometry_msgs/msg/Point ignition::msgs::Vector3d geometry_msgs/msg/Pose ignition::msgs::Pose geometry_msgs/msg/PoseStamped ignition::msgs::Pose geometry_msgs/msg/Transform ignition::msgs::Pose geometry_msgs/msg/TransformStamped ignition::msgs::Pose geometry_msgs/msg/Twist ignition::msgs::Twist mav_msgs/msg/Actuators (TODO) ignition::msgs::Actuators (TODO) nav_msgs/msg/Odometry ignition::msgs::Odometry rcl_interfaces/msg/ParameterValue ignition::msgs::Any ros_ign_interfaces/msg/Contact ignition::msgs::Contact ros_ign_interfaces/msg/Contacts ignition::msgs::Contacts ros_ign_interfaces/msg/Dataframe ignition::msgs::Dataframe ros_ign_interfaces/msg/Entity ignition::msgs::Entity ros_ign_interfaces/msg/GuiCamera ignition::msgs::GUICamera ros_ign_interfaces/msg/JointWrench ignition::msgs::JointWrench ros_ign_interfaces/msg/Light ignition::msgs::Light ros_ign_interfaces/msg/ParamVec ignition::msgs::Param ros_ign_interfaces/msg/ParamVec ignition::msgs::Param_V ros_ign_interfaces/msg/StringVec ignition::msgs::StringMsg_V ros_ign_interfaces/msg/TrackVisual ignition::msgs::TrackVisual ros_ign_interfaces/msg/VideoRecord ignition::msgs::VideoRecord rosgraph_msgs/msg/Clock ignition::msgs::Clock sensor_msgs/msg/BatteryState ignition::msgs::BatteryState sensor_msgs/msg/CameraInfo ignition::msgs::CameraInfo sensor_msgs/msg/FluidPressure ignition::msgs::FluidPressure sensor_msgs/msg/Imu ignition::msgs::IMU sensor_msgs/msg/Image ignition::msgs::Image sensor_msgs/msg/JointState ignition::msgs::Model sensor_msgs/msg/LaserScan ignition::msgs::LaserScan sensor_msgs/msg/MagneticField ignition::msgs::Magnetometer sensor_msgs/msg/NavSatFix ignition::msgs::NavSat sensor_msgs/msg/PointCloud2 ignition::msgs::PointCloudPacked tf2_msgs/msg/TFMessage ignition::msgs::Pose_V trajectory_msgs/msg/JointTrajectory ignition::msgs::JointTrajectory Run ros2 run ros_ign_bridge parameter_bridge instructions. Ignition Transport talker ROS listener Start parameter bridge watch topics. Shell ~/bridge_ws/install/setup.bash ros2 run ros_ign_bridge parameter_bridge /chatter@std_msgs/msg/String@ignition.msgs.StringMsg start ROS listener. Shell /opt/ros/galactic/setup.bash ros2 topic echo /chatter start Ignition Transport talker. Shell ign topic pub /chatter ignition.msgs.StringMsg 'data:"Hello"' ROS talker Ignition Transport listener Start parameter bridge watch topics. Shell ~/bridge_ws/install/setup.bash ros2 run ros_ign_bridge parameter_bridge /chatter@std_msgs/msg/String@ignition.msgs.StringMsg start Ignition Transport listener. Shell ign topic /chatter start ROS talker. Shell /opt/ros/galactic/setup.bash ros2 topic pub /chatter std_msgs/msg/String "data: 'Hi'" Run bridge exchange images generate Ignition Transport images Ignition Gazebo, converted ROS images, visualized rqt_image_viewer. start Ignition Gazebo. Shell ign gazebo sensors_demo.sdf Let’s topic camera images published. Shell ign topic grep image /rgbd_camera/depth_image /rgbd_camera/image start parameter bridge previous topic. Shell ~/bridge_ws/install/setup.bash ros2 run ros_ign_bridge parameter_bridge /rgbd_camera/image@sensor_msgs/msg/Image@ignition.msgs.Image start ROS GUI: Shell /opt/ros/galactic/setup.bash ros2 run rqt_image_view rqt_image_view /rgbd_camera/image current images rqt_image_view coming Gazebo (published Ignition Msgs Ignition Transport). screenshot shows shell windows expected content ROS Galactic Ignition Fortress): Static bridge run executable starts bidirectional bridge specific topic message type. static_bridge executable installed bridge. example’s code ros_ign_bridge/src/static_bridge.cpp. code, bridge hardcoded bridge string messages published /chatter topic. Let’s give starting Ignition ROS terminal start bridge: ros2 run ros_ign_bridge static_bridge terminal start ROS listener: ros2 topic echo /chatter std_msgs/msg/String terminal publish Ignition message: ign topic pub /chatter ignition.msgs.StringMsg 'data:"Hello"' point, ROS listener echoing message. let’s ROS Ignition. terminal start Igntion listener: ign topic /chatter terminal publish ROS message: ros2 topic pub /chatter std_msgs/msg/String 'data: "Hello"' Ignition listener echoing message. Configuring Bridge YAML configuring topics, easier file-based configuration markup language. case, ros_ign bridge supports YAML file configure parameters. configuration file YAML array maps. configuration bridges showing ways bridge Set topic applies topic_name: "chatter" ros_type_name: "std_msgs/msg/String" ign_type_name: "ignition.msgs.StringMsg" Set ROS topic applies ros_topic_name: "chatter_ros" ros_type_name: "std_msgs/msg/String" ign_type_name: "ignition.msgs.StringMsg" Set IGN topic applies ign_topic_name: "chatter_ign" ros_type_name: "std_msgs/msg/String" ign_type_name: "ignition.msgs.StringMsg" Set topic explicitly ros_topic_name: "chatter_both_ros" ign_topic_name: "chatter_both_ign" ros_type_name: "std_msgs/msg/String" ign_type_name: "ignition.msgs.StringMsg" Full set configurations ros_topic_name: "ros_chatter" ign_topic_name: "ign_chatter" ros_type_name: "std_msgs/msg/String" ign_type_name: "ignition.msgs.StringMsg" subscriber_queue: Default publisher_queue: Default lazy: true Default "false" direction: BIDIRECTIONAL Default "BIDIRECTIONAL" Bridge directions "IGN_TO_ROS" Bridge Ignition topic ROS "ROS_TO_IGN" Bridge ROS topic Ignition run bridge node configuration: ros2 run ros_ign_bridge bridge_node --ros-args config_file:=$WORKSPACE/ros_ign/ros_ign_bridge/test/config/full.yaml API ROS Parameters: subscription_heartbeat Period node checks subscribers lazy bridges. config_file YAML file loaded bridge configuration
